title: What a Quality Manual Must Contain
alt: Six core elements of a lean pharmaceutical quality manual

items.label: Scope & Applicability
items.desc: Sites, activities, dosage forms and licences covered — and exclusions.

items.label: Quality Policy & Objectives
items.desc: Senior management commitment with measurable, metric-linked objectives.

items.label: Organisation & Responsibilities
items.desc: QP, RP, site management and quality unit roles and independence.

items.label: The PQS Elements
items.desc: Four ICH Q10 elements cross-referenced to governing procedures.

items.label: Risk Management
items.desc: How ICH Q9 principles inform decisions across the lifecycle.

items.label: Document & Data Governance
items.desc: Documentation hierarchy plus data integrity and ALCOA+ commitment.
